description:
The ScaleGizmo component is used to allow scaling of a slot it is targeting.

See Dev tool.

fields.AutoPositionAtTargetSlot: Whether to auto position this gizmo at ``TargetSlot``
fields._interactingComponent: The component that is interacting with this component.
fields._material: The material for the gizmo visual.
fields._toolPoint: The slot representing the interacting dev tool's tip.
fields._activePoint: The active point of the gizmo
fields._lineRoot: the root of the line visual going back to ``_toolPoint``.
fields._lineSegment: The line segment for the line from gizmo center to ``_toolPoint``.
fields._snapHighlight: The slot for a snap point highlight like a selected cube corner.
fields.TargetScale: The scale field of what this is scaling.
fields.HandleLength: The length of the scale gizmo handles.
fields._xSlot: The scale gizmo for the x axis.
fields._ySlot: The scale gizmo for the y axis.
fields._zSlot: The scale gizmo for the z axis.
